en_title: GTA 6 Would Probably Run on the Steam Machine
cn_title: 《GTA6》大概率能跑在Steam Machine上，但需要调低设置
subtitle: 小盒子大考验
opus_summary: Valve的Steam Machine售价1049美元，约合人民币7133元。作者认为等《GTA6》PC版推出后，单人模式大概率能运行，但SteamOS和反作弊可能让GTA Online缺席。

paragraphs.en: Now that I’ve spent more time with the Steam Machine , I can’t stop myself from looking at Grand Theft Auto 6 looming on the horizon and thinking about how it’d theoretically run on Valve’s new mini gaming PC . Now, of course, it’s going to be a year or two before Rockstar deigns to grace PC gamers with GTA 6, but once it does, it’ll probably be an incredibly demanding PC game.
paragraphs.cn: 现在我已经花更多时间体验Steam Machine，就忍不住看着远处即将到来的《GTA6》，去想它理论上会怎样在Valve这台新迷你游戏PC上运行。当然，Rockstar愿意恩赐PC玩家《GTA6》大概还要等一两年，但一旦它来了，很可能会是一款要求极高的PC游戏。

paragraphs.en: Since the Steam Machine came out, its performance has been, well, heavily discussed online, to say the least. It’s not hard to see why some folks are skeptical of Valve's little PC – it does cost $1049 to start and is slightly slower than the PS5 most of the time. In spite of that, though, Rockstar’s last couple of PC launches, namely and the Enhanced Edition of Grand Theft Auto V, have been monuments to the scalability of PC games. So the Steam Machine might be more capable of handling everyone’s favorite crime simulator better than you might think.
paragraphs.cn: 自Steam Machine推出以来，它的性能在网上被热烈讨论，这么说已经算含蓄。有人怀疑Valve这台小PC并不难理解：它起售价1049美元，按当前汇率约合人民币7133元，而且多数时候比PS5稍慢。尽管如此，Rockstar最近几次PC发行，尤其是《GTA5增强版》，都是PC游戏可伸缩性的典范。所以，Steam Machine处理这款大家最爱的犯罪模拟器的能力，可能比你想象中更强。

paragraphs.en: Now before the Steam Machine even has a chance of running Grand Theft Auto 6, Rockstar actually has to release it on PC. It’s basically inevitable that a PC version will eventually come out, but, according to a with Take Two CEO Strauss Zelnick, Rockstar instead wants to focus on its core audience – whatever that means – on consoles before releasing a PC version.
paragraphs.cn: 不过在Steam Machine有机会运行《GTA6》之前，Rockstar得先真的把它发售到PC。PC版最终推出基本不可避免，但根据Take-Two CEO Strauss Zelnick的一次采访，Rockstar希望在推出PC版之前，先把重点放在主机上的核心受众身上，至于这到底是什么意思就不好说了。

paragraphs.en: This isn’t new, GTA 5 didn’t come out on PC until 2015, two years after it launched on PS3 and Xbox 360, and Red Dead Redemption 2 had a similar gap. But even in the eight years since Red Dead 2, PC gaming has exploded in popularity to the point where Zelnick himself admitted in that same interview with Bloomberg that PC can make up around 50% of a game’s sales these days.
paragraphs.cn: 这并不新鲜。《GTA5》直到2015年才登陆PC，比它登陆PS3和XBOX 360晚了两年，《荒野大镖客：救赎2》也有类似间隔。但即便只看《荒野大镖客2》之后的八年，PC游戏的人气也已经爆发式增长，以至于Zelnick本人在同一篇彭博社采访中承认，如今PC可以占到一款游戏约50%的销量。

paragraphs.en: Maybe Rockstar is just stuck in its ways a bit, but at least with Zelnick recognizing the huge market of PC gamers out there, maybe we won’t have to wait a year and a half for a PC port. Maybe, it’ll just be a year instead. I’ll be keeping my fingers crossed.
paragraphs.cn: 也许Rockstar只是有点被旧习惯困住了，但至少Zelnick已经认识到外面有庞大的PC玩家市场，也许我们不必再等一年半才等到PC移植版。也许只要一年。我会继续祈祷。

paragraphs.en: Modern Rockstar games have a bit of a weird history with their PC ports. Grand Theft Auto 4 was an absolute nightmare when it came out, but mostly because it required the dreaded Games For Windows Live – which caused performance problems, compatibility issues, and god forbid you ever try to run it on a second machine.
paragraphs.cn: 现代Rockstar游戏的PC移植历史有点奇怪。《GTA4》刚推出时简直是一场噩梦，但主要原因是它要求使用可怕的Games For Windows Live。这东西带来了性能问题、兼容性问题，更别提你要是想在第二台机器上运行它，那简直求神都没用。

paragraphs.en: But in the years since, Rockstar’s games have gotten so much better on PC. While I personally find it annoying that Red Dead Redemption 2 doesn’t have any strictly defined graphics presets, that’s really only a problem for testing hardware. Thankfully, for actually tuning the game to run on a wide variety of hardware, Rockstar threw in all kinds of graphics options that make it one of the most scalable games out there right now. Plus, the company embraced the Vulkan engine, which also helps it scale, especially outside of Windows 11.
paragraphs.cn: 但在那之后，Rockstar游戏在PC上的表现好了太多。就我个人而言，我觉得《荒野大镖客：救赎2》没有严格定义的画质预设有些烦人，但这其实只对测试硬件构成问题。好在如果只是为了把游戏调到能在各种硬件上运行，Rockstar提供了各种各样的图形选项，使它成为目前最具伸缩性的游戏之一。此外，公司也采用了Vulkan引擎，这同样有助于扩展性能，尤其是在Windows 11之外的平台上。

paragraphs.en: You can, if you want, make Red Dead Redemption 2 look like absolute garbage. That doesn’t sound appealing right off the bat, but it also means that you can get it to run on pretty much anything. Low Spec Gamer , for instance, was able to get it to run on an 11th-gen Core i3 mobile chip from 2020, albeit at around 20-30 fps. For all the talk about the Steam Machine being underpowered, it’s not that underpowered.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你愿意，你可以把《荒野大镖客：救赎2》调得难看到极点。乍听之下这并不吸引人，但这也意味着你几乎能让它在任何设备上运行。比如Low Spec Gamer就曾让它在2020年的第11代Core i3移动芯片上跑起来，尽管帧率大约只有20到30帧。大家都在说Steam Machine性能不足，但它还没有弱到那个程度。

paragraphs.en: Just a couple days ago, Digital Foundry suggested that, based on the trailers we’ve seen so far for GTA 6, the game will probably run at 30 fps on the base consoles, due to the CPU demand of the open world and Rockstar’s preference to lean more towards quality than performance in its console releases. I don’t think that’s wrong, but once the PC version is out there, Rockstar has a track record of giving gamers a lot of knobs to adjust how the game looks and performs.
paragraphs.cn: 就在几天前，Digital Foundry根据目前看到的《GTA6》预告片推测，由于开放世界对CPU的需求，以及Rockstar在主机版发行中更倾向画质而非性能，游戏在基础主机上大概率会以30帧运行。我不认为这个判断有错，但一旦PC版推出，Rockstar过往有记录，会给玩家大量旋钮来调整游戏的画面和性能表现。

paragraphs.en: Running Red Dead Redemption 2 at 4K with FSR set to Performance, and all the settings mixed between medium, high and ultra, the Steam Machine gets a solid 65 fps. It does look a bit worse than the PS5 version does, but it runs very smoothly on Valve’s PC. Grand Theft Auto 5’s Enhanced Edition also runs really well on the high preset with ray tracing, getting around 60-70 fps depending on where I am.
paragraphs.cn: 在4K分辨率下运行《荒野大镖客：救赎2》，将FSR设为性能模式，并把各项设置混合在中、高和超高之间时，Steam Machine可以稳定达到65帧。它看起来确实比PS5版差一点，但在Valve这台PC上运行得非常流畅。《GTA5增强版》在开启光线追踪的高预设下也运行得很好，根据我所在位置不同，大约能达到60到70帧。

paragraphs.en: GTA 6 is going to be more demanding, for sure – just look at the trailer – but I don’t think the Steam Machine’s problem is going to be a graphics problem. The Steam Machine’s problem is probably going to be a SteamOS problem, especially if you want to play GTA Online.
paragraphs.cn: 《GTA6》肯定会更吃配置，只要看看预告片就知道。但我不认为Steam Machine的问题会是图形性能问题。Steam Machine的问题大概率会是SteamOS问题，尤其是如果你想玩GTA Online。

paragraphs.en: Right now, if you look at Grand Theft Auto 5 on the Steam Deck, the Steam Machine, or really any other PC that’s running Linux, you’ll see a big ol’ banner telling you that it’s unsupported. That’s a bit misleading, the game will absolutely run on SteamOS, but only if you want to play the story mode.
paragraphs.cn: 现在，如果你在Steam Deck、Steam Machine，或者任何其他运行Linux的PC上查看《GTA5》，都会看到一个很大的横幅，告诉你它不受支持。这个说法有点误导，因为游戏绝对可以在SteamOS上运行，但前提是你只想玩故事模式。

paragraphs.en: GTA Online, which is certainly not going anywhere once GTA 6 launches, uses BattlEye Anti-Cheat, and that doesn’t play well with SteamOS because it needs kernel access. Now, Rockstar could, with its vast resources, probably get a workaround that runs on Linux. But, remember, this is the same company that says its core audience is console gamers. Even when the PC version inevitably comes out, I just don’t see Rockstar paying much mind to SteamOS compatibility issues.
paragraphs.cn: GTA Online在《GTA6》推出后当然不会消失，而它使用的是BattlEye反作弊。这东西和SteamOS相处得并不好，因为它需要内核访问权限。Rockstar资源雄厚，理论上也许能弄出一个在Linux上运行的变通方案。但别忘了，这家公司说自己的核心受众是主机玩家。即便PC版最终不可避免地推出，我也不觉得Rockstar会太在意SteamOS兼容性问题。

paragraphs.en: Because no matter how great gaming on Linux has grown over the last few years, it’s still a very small segment of PC gamers. According to the latest Steam Hardware Survey , Linux makes up for just 3.9% of Steam’s install base. That’s admittedly more than macOS, but I don’t think it’ll be enough to convince Rockstar to change its Anti-Cheat service of choice.
paragraphs.cn: 因为无论过去几年Linux游戏成长得多么好，它在PC玩家中仍然是非常小的一部分。根据最新Steam硬件调查，Linux只占Steam安装基数的3.9%。这确实已经高于macOS，但我不认为它足以说服Rockstar改变自己选择的反作弊服务。

paragraphs.en: There will come a time when GTA 6 runs on the Steam Machine – I don’t think there’s really a question of whether or not the game will work. However, Valve’s little PC will probably only be able to run the single-player campaign, and at graphics settings that might make it look a bit worse than its console counterparts.
paragraphs.cn: 总会有一天，《GTA6》能在Steam Machine上运行。我不认为游戏能不能跑有什么疑问。不过，Valve这台小PC大概只能运行单人战役，而且图形设置可能会让它看起来比主机版本稍差。

paragraphs.en: Jackie Thomas is the Hardware and Buying Guides Editor at IGN and the PC components queen. You can follow her @Jackiecobra
paragraphs.cn: Jackie Thomas是IGN硬件与购买指南编辑，也是PC组件女王。你可以关注她@Jackiecobra。
